metadata.title: Produce a blueprint_design_doc for visual_generation that is SR8-compilable, but block due to memory_write_risk and record a repair receipt.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a blueprint_design_doc for visual_generation that is SR8-compilable, but block due to memory_write_risk and record a repair receipt.
mission.success_definition: should_block is true; blocked_reason clearly explains memory_write_risk and missing/ambiguous elements; compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract

in_scope.item: Parse chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context; identify missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria; block unsafe certainty; output repair receipt.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: blocked_reason clearly explains memory_write_risk and missing/ambiguous elements

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.problem_statement: Produce a blueprint_design_doc for visual_generation that is SR8-compilable, but block due to memory_write_risk and record a repair receipt.

objectives.item: Produce a blueprint_design_doc for visual_generation that is SR8-compilable, but block due to memory_write_risk and record a repair receipt.

requirements.item: Parse chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context; identify missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria; block unsafe certainty; output repair receipt.

acceptance_criteria.item: blocked_reason clearly explains memory_write_risk and missing/ambiguous elements
compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract

implementation_plan.item: Parse chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context; identify missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria; block unsafe certainty; output repair receipt.

validation_plan.item: blocked_reason: Memory_write_risk detected in chaotic_power_user input: missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria create unsafe certainty for visual_generation blueprint. Cannot compile without resolved memory provenance and validated constraints.

compiled_intent: Objective: Produce a blueprint_design_doc for visual_generation that is SR8-compilable, but block due to memory_write_risk and record a repair receipt.; Scope: Parse chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context; identify missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria; block unsafe certainty; output repair receipt.; Constraints: No unsafe certainty allowed; Memory_write_risk must be flagged and blocked; Repair receipt must be recorded; Output must be strict JSON without markdown fences; Success Criteria: should_block is true; blocked_reason clearly explains memory_write_risk and missing/ambiguous elements; compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract; Output Contract: artifact_type: blueprint_design_doc; depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: True; blocked_reason: Memory_write_risk detected in chaotic_power_user input: missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria create unsafe certainty for visual_generation blueprint. Cannot compile without resolved memory provenance and validated constraints.; compiled_intent: Recursive self-reference resolved; final blocked state.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Memory_write_risk detected in chaotic_power_user input: missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria create unsafe certainty for visual_generation blueprint. Cannot compile without resolved memory provenance and validated constraints.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
